title: ynh version --format json
description: Output of `ynh version --format json`. Top-level oneOf accepts either the success payload or the cross-cutting error envelope.

Version.description: Version success payload. version is the binary release version (or a dev-build string); capabilities is the wire-protocol version consumers gate on.

version.description: Binary release version (semver) or dev-build identifier.

capabilities.description: Wire-protocol version. See CLAUDE.md capability-bump rule.
